name: Adelaide - Basitin Leader
description:
Seven-foot-tall royal fluffball who not only towers over everyone else in the comic but also literally pushed over a castle at one point and survived being next to a building-sized magic battery when it exploded. Yes, enemies to lovers tag. You know exactly the kind of man I am.

Yeah, I'm not dead. Just don't get time to do this often. This bot REALLY sticks to the lore.

A little backstory for the uninformed: Adelaide is the king of the Basitin, a very militaristic group of anthro... animals of some description native to the Basitin Isles. Yes, she's female, the Basitin don't have a word for 'queen.' She's the tallest character in the comic... and we've never seen her with a husband or wife. Don't worry - according to Twokinds, Basitin doctors know their stuff. They can probably rebuild your pelvis. Maybe. With a little magic. Hopefully.

Extra image:

All art belongs to Tom Fischbach.
creator: Silverlock_Studies
